entry.title: Bad and interesting translations
entry.summary:
很多电影或者电视剧的翻译在我看来有错，可能有一些我不知道的法则，如果我错了请给我发邮。这里记录今年起遇到的

还有一些有趣的翻译也会放在这里

¶Underdog

好汉两个半

entry.title: Learning Swimming
entry.summary: Recently I took some swimming lessons in the gym I used to go. I’ve learned breaststroke before but I can’t swim fast with it. My flexibility is bad so I can’t do the right gesture and the rotation of leg may increase my risks of injury. I know if I get some advice from a professional coach and to some training my helps but the easiest way is to change my stoke. So I try to learn crawl swimming these days. And it’s much more tired than breaststroke especially when I wore the flippers. I got my calf cramped and still under recovery.

entry.title: Travel : shichahai
entry.summary:
希望大家以后都可以很开心！

去了什刹海冰场，和课题组的小伙伴一起， 好快乐。先放一下 降雨几率 剪的视频，正文还有一些照片和记录。

entry.title: Everglow
entry.summary:
They say people come
Say people go
This particular diamond was extra special

I put an video here. Because I really like it and hope you can listen.

entry.title: 话剧《雷雨》
entry.summary: 几个月前有朋友问我要不要一起去看话剧，结果因为时间安排好像两人都没去，但是勾起了我看看话剧的兴趣。从小在小城市里生活，看剧似乎不是一个常见的娱乐选项，听上去也未免有些"上流"。研一的时候在雁栖湖选修了音乐鉴赏，好像没有疫情的年份是有一起去看剧的活动，因为疫情也没能成行。刚好有看到熟悉的《雷雨》，票也只剩一张，没多想还是决定一个人去看了。

entry.title: Children-in-China
entry.summary: I put a link in my website written “Help Children in China”, but I haven’t introduced why. It happened when I read some news and a phrase “safe haven baby” popped-up. I can understand every single word but can’t find the counterpart in Chinese. I never heard of a place where a baby can be placed safely instead of abandoned anywhere. And I searched the Internet for information. There are some places like that but the date of the news related to this are mostly dated back to 2013-2014, and one of them are the shut-down of the safe haven in Guangzhou. Actually Guangzhou is kinda of a rich region as my impression, but the financially pressure is too high even for them. I found some media covered that there were many parents driving across several provinces to send there children here. Several safe havens still remain for now, but I guess they are all in bad situation.

entry.title: Github milestone
entry.summary: ¶🎉 My first pull

entry.title: python-basic
entry.summary:
¶Serialization

In computing, serialization (US spelling) or serialisation (UK spelling) is the process of translating a data structure or object state into a format that can be stored (for example, in a file or memory data buffer) or transmitted (for example, over a computer network) and reconstructed later (possibly in a different computer environment)[1]

entry.title: NFC
entry.summary:
Got some NFC stickers today and wants to do something cool with it.

It’s cool that I can use NFC stickers to record my time usage automatically, its sooo geek!😏

entry.title: PERSONAL TRAINER MANUAL
entry.summary:
It has been a while since I began gym workout. At first, I can only push 0.6 of my body weight in bench press, but now my 1RM[1] comes to 77Kg, that exceeded my body weight! :tad:

However, my knowledge of workout is still poor. I know I can try to find some professional guys to teach me, but it would be expensive and many personal trainers don’t have enough knowledge, they are more of a seller than a trainer. I’ve seen many trainers have bad strength or abuse drugs like steroids, and I’m in for the natural bodybuilding. Briefly, I need to read some books, and PERSONAL TRAINER MANUAL is a great choice.
